---
title: "FEMA Individual Assistance Funds"
format: 
  html:
    df-print: paged
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(modelsummary)
library(sf)


knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# all disasters in Illinois, filter in next step
ind_assist <- read_csv("./inputs/data/indiv_assistance_CookCounty3.csv") |> 
  filter(incidentType != "Biological" & disasterNumber != "1763")

# all disasters in Cook County, IL
cook_assist <- ind_assist %>% filter(county == "Cook (County)")

# # Just Flood events in 2023
# ind_assist <- ind_assist %>% 
#   filter(county == "Cook (County)" & disasterNumber %in% c("4728", "4749") )

# Include other big flood events:
ind_assist <- ind_assist %>% 
  filter(county == "Cook (County)" & disasterNumber %in% c("4728", "4749", "1935", "4116") ) |>
    mutate(year = str_sub(declarationDate, 1, 4),
         joinyear = ifelse(year < 2022, 2000, 2020))

#table(ind_assist$damagedZipCode[ind_assist$disasterNumber=="1935"])
#table(ind_assist$damagedZipCode[ind_assist$disasterNumber=="4728"])

zipcodes <- read_sf("inputs/shapefiles_cook/CookZipcodes.shp")


cook_assist <- cook_assist |> 
  mutate(year = str_sub(declarationDate, 1, 4),
         joinyear = ifelse(year < 2022, 2000, 2020))
```

```{r warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
# PUMA shapefiles
#pumasIL <- pumas("IL", cb=T, year=2019)

library(tigris)


zipsIL2000 <- zctas(starts_with="60", cb=T, year=2000) %>% mutate(year = 2000)

zipsIL2020 <- zctas(cb=T, starts_with="60", year=2020) %>% mutate(year = 2020)


zipsIL2000 <- zipsIL2000 |> 
  select(ZCTA = ZCTA,
         NAME = NAME,
         year)

zipsIL2020 <- zipsIL2020 |> 
  select(ZCTA = ZCTA5CE20,
         NAME = NAME20,
         year)

zips <- rbind(zipsIL2000, zipsIL2020)



border <- st_read("inputs/Mapping_FIRMs/Cook_County_Border/Cook_County_Border.shp") |> st_transform("EPSG:6454")

zips <- zips |> 
    st_transform("EPSG:6454") |>

    st_intersection(st_as_sf(border))
  # filter(as.numeric(ZCTA) >=60600 & as.numeric(ZCTA) <= 60900)

```


# Applicants (Granted and Denied together)

```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Number of applications for individual assistance received for all declarations in Cook County" 

cook_assist %>% 
  group_by(declarationDate, disasterNumber) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            ihpAmount = sum(ihpAmount),
            haAmount = sum(haAmount))
```

```{r}
#| fig-label: fig-mapzipcodes-applicants
# #| fig-cap: "location of applicants"
#| layout-ncol: 2


cook_assist |> 
 # filter(disasterNumber == 4749 | disasterNumber == 4728) |>
  group_by(joinyear, disasterNumber, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
#  full_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>%   
  full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = claimcount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Applicants by Zip Code & Disaster Declaration", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Count",
    labels = scales::comma

  )+
  facet_wrap(~disasterNumber)

cook_assist |> 
  filter(ihpAmount > 0 & disasterNumber != "NA" & !is.na(disasterNumber) & !is.na(damagedZipCode )) |>
  group_by(joinyear, disasterNumber, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
  #full_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>% 
    full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = claimcount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Granted Aid by Zip Code & Disaster Declaration", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Count",
    labels = scales::comma

  )+
  facet_wrap(~disasterNumber)
```

```{r}
cook_assist |> 
  filter(!is.na(incidentType) & incidentType != "NA") |>
  group_by(joinyear, incidentType, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
  #full_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>% 
  full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = claimcount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Applicants per Year", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Count",
    labels = scales::comma
  )+
  facet_wrap(~incidentType)
```


```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Number of applications for individual assistance received for the two disaster declarations in Cook County during 2023." 

ind_assist %>% 
  group_by(declarationDate, disasterNumber) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            ihpAmount = sum(ihpAmount),
            haAmount = sum(haAmount))
```


```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Number of applications for individual assistance received for the two disaster declarations in Cook County during 2023 by if they had flood insurance or not."
#| 
ind_assist %>% 
  group_by(damagedCity, floodInsurance) %>% 
  summarize(claimcount = n(),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE)))  %>% 
  arrange(desc(claimcount)) %>%
  pivot_wider(values_from = claimcount, names_from = floodInsurance)
```


```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Number of applications per zipcode by if they had flood insurance."


ind_assist %>% 
  group_by(damagedZipCode, floodInsurance) %>% 
  summarize(claimcount = n()) %>% 
  arrange(desc(claimcount)) %>%
 pivot_wider(values_from = claimcount, names_from = floodInsurance)

```


```{r}
#| fig-label: fig-mapzipcodes-applicants
#| fig-cap: "location of applicants"


ind_assist |> 
  filter(disasterNumber == 4749 | disasterNumber == 4728) |>
  group_by(joinyear, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
 # full_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>%  
    full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = claimcount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Applicants by Zip Code", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Count",
      labels = scales::comma

  )
```

```{r}
#| fig-label: fig-mapzipcodes-applicants
#| fig-cap: "location of applicants"

ind_assist |> 
  filter(disasterNumber == 4749 | disasterNumber == 4728 & floodInsurance == TRUE) |>
  group_by(joinyear, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
 # full_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>%  
    full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = claimcount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Applicants with Flood Insurance by Zip Code", 
       caption = "Disaster Declarations 4729 and 4728 only") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "blue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Count",
  labels = scales::comma
  )
```


# Applications with Grants Awarded

```{r}
#| fig-label: fig-mapzipcodes-applicants
# #| fig-cap: "location of applicants"
#| layout-ncol: 2


cook_assist |> 
  filter(disasterNumber %in% c(1935,4116, 4728, 4749) ) |>
    filter(ihpAmount > 0 & disasterNumber != "NA" & !is.na(disasterNumber) & !is.na(damagedZipCode )) |>

  group_by(joinyear, disasterNumber, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
  #left_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>%   
    full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = ihpAmount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Granted Aid by Zip Code & Disaster Declaration", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Dollars",
    labels = scales::dollar

  )+
  facet_wrap(~disasterNumber)

cook_assist |> 
  filter(disasterNumber %in% c(1935,4116, 4728, 4749) ) |>
  filter(ihpAmount > 0 & disasterNumber != "NA" & !is.na(disasterNumber) & !is.na(damagedZipCode )) |>
  group_by(joinyear, disasterNumber, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
 # left_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>%   
    full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = claimcount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Granted Aid by Zip Code & Disaster Declaration", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Count",
    labels = scales::comma

  )+
  facet_wrap(~disasterNumber)
```


```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "`ihpAmount` includes amount awarded for Housing Assistance (HA) and Other Needs Assistance (ONA)."

ind_assist %>% 
  filter(ihpAmount > 0) |> 
  group_by(declarationDate, disasterNumber) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            ihpAmount = sum(ihpAmount),
            haAmount = sum(haAmount))
```


```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Applications with flood premiums paid from the two disaster declarations. 160 applications did not have flood insurance and had a flood insurance premium greater than $0. (which doesn't make sense?)"


ind_assist %>% 
  filter(fipAmount > 0) |> 
  group_by(declarationDate, disasterNumber, floodInsurance) %>% 
  summarize(n = n())
```


```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Applications awarded funds: by if they had flood insurance or not. Both Flood Events in 2023"


ind_assist %>% 
  filter(ihpAmount > 0) |>
  group_by(damagedCity, floodInsurance) %>% 
  summarize(claimcount = n(),
                #ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE)),
           # haAmount = round(sum(haAmount, na.rm=TRUE) )
           )  %>% 
  arrange(desc(claimcount)) %>%
  pivot_wider(values_from = claimcount, names_from = floodInsurance) %>% 
  arrange(desc(`TRUE`)) |> 
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)
```




## July Storm

```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "July Disaster Declaration. Number of applicants who were awarded funds."

ind_assist %>% 
    filter(disasterNumber == 4728 & ihpAmount > 0 & floodDamage == TRUE) |>
  group_by(damagedCity, residenceType#, floodInsurance
           ) %>% 
  summarize(claimcount = n(),
            awardedfunds = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) %>% 
  arrange(desc(claimcount)) |> 
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)
```

```{r mapzipcodes4728}

ind_assist |> 
  filter(disasterNumber == 4728 & ihpAmount > 0 & floodDamage==TRUE) |>
  group_by(joinyear, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
 # full_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>% 
    full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = claimcount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "July Storm - Claims by Zip Codes", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Count",
  )


ind_assist |> 
  filter(disasterNumber == 4728 & ihpAmount > 0
         & floodDamage==TRUE) |>
  group_by(joinyear, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
  #full_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>%  
    full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = ihpAmount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "July Storm - IHP Grants by Zip Codes", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Dollars",
  labels = scales::dollar
  )
```

## September Storm


```{r}
#| label: fig-mapzipcodes-septstorm

ind_assist |> 
  filter(disasterNumber == 4749 & ihpAmount > 0) |>
  group_by(joinyear, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
  #full_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>%    
    full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = claimcount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "September Storm - Claims by Zip Codes", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Count",
    labels = scales::comma

  )

ind_assist |> 
  filter(disasterNumber == 4749 & ihpAmount > 0) |>
  group_by(joinyear, damagedZipCode) %>%
    summarize(claimcount = round(n()),
                ihpAmount = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) |> 
  mutate(damagedZipCode = as.character(damagedZipCode))|>
 # full_join(zipcodes, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA5CE20")) %>%   
    full_join(zips, by = c("damagedZipCode" = "ZCTA", "joinyear" = "year")) %>%    

  ggplot(aes(fill = ihpAmount)) +
  geom_sf(aes(geometry = geometry), color = "black") +
  labs(title = "September Storm - IHP Grants by Zip Codes", caption = "") +
    theme_void() +
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank())+# +#+
  scale_fill_steps2(
    high = "darkblue", low = "black",
  na.value = "white",
    nice.breaks = FALSE,
    show.limits=TRUE,
    name = "Dollars",
  labels = scales::dollar
  )
```





```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "September Disaster Declaration. Number of applicants who received funds."


ind_assist %>% 
  filter(disasterNumber == 4749 & ihpAmount > 0) |>
  group_by(damagedCity, residenceType#, floodInsurance
           ) %>% 
  summarize(claimcount = n(),
            awardedfunds = round(sum(ihpAmount, na.rm=TRUE))) %>% 
  arrange(desc(claimcount)) |> 
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)
```


# Descriptive Stats

```{r eval=FALSE}
table(ind_assist$residenceType, ind_assist$disasterNumber)

table(ind_assist$grossIncome, ind_assist$disasterNumber)

ind_assist <- ind_assist |> mutate(across(c(disasterNumber, damagedZipCode), as.factor))

# datasummary_skim(ind_assist, type = "dataset")
# datasummary_skim(ind_assist, type = "numeric")
# datasummary_skim(ind_assist, type = "categorical")

datasummary_balance(~disasterNumber, data = ind_assist %>% 
                      filter(ihpAmount > 0 & floodDamage == TRUE))

```
